issues.message: <Heading> is not a Marigold component. It is not exported from @marigold/components.
issues.suggestion: <Heading> does not exist in @marigold/components. Search the Marigold docs for the correct component.

issues.message: Inline style on <Stack> bypasses the design system (maxWidth, margin).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: TS2305: Module '"@marigold/components"' has no exported member 'Heading'.
issues.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript error reported by the compiler. The exact location is included in the issue location field.

issues.message:
TS2322: Type '{ children: Element; space: 0; style: { maxWidth: number; margin: string; }; }' is not assignable to type 'IntrinsicAttributes & StackProps'.
  Property 'style' does not exist on type 'IntrinsicAttributes & StackProps'.
issues.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript error reported by the compiler. The exact location is included in the issue location field.

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.
